2275460.name: Gangsta Style
2275460.description:
There's only one way to be the toughest in the neighborhood... It's not brute strength, it's not violence... it's style. Gangsta Style.

This is a one-of-a-kind versus-fighting first-person shooter with voice controls.

Step 1: make them fall

There are rules out there: if you don't follow them, you're no more than an animal. So the first thing you need to do is slide into your opponent's legs to make them fall.

Once that's done, they're at your mercy!

Step 2: aim for the head (slaps optional)

Now that they're down your opponent is going to cover their face with their hands: that's a weak attempt at preventing you from aiming properly.

Slap 'em in the face, move around, make sure they can't see where you're aiming, and cock your gun to the side. If you shoot with your gun upright you're probably a narc.

Don't waste your time, they might get back up after a few seconds.

Step 3: say the words!

Now comes the most important part: you may now execute them but ONLY if you say the words "Gangsta Style" in a cool way. That's the part that uses your microphone, because you actually have to say the words.

Got all of this? Then get in there and show 'em what you're made of!

Features

  • Online Best-of-three matches with exciting gameplay!

  • Execute your opponents "gangsta style" by actually cocking your gun to the side and saying the words!

  • Proximity chat for fun banter and laughing at your opponent's failure to say the words!

  • Customize your gangsta with new skins, clothes, and guns!
2275460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
